implementation_validation: Core verification is consolidated into one manifest-driven runner. Standard parser tests, note and registry alignment, source accounting, active-set checks, implementation reachability, and current-document validation remain executable through npm run verify.
linguistic_confidence: No construction status, parser span, evidence claim, or survey result changed. This release changes verification organization only.
overclaim_review_scope: Reviewed the removed scripts and outputs as historical or duplicated infrastructure. Preserved current parser tests, evidence gates, panel checks, release gates, and all construction records.
unresolved_release_questions: RUL and PFV survey integration remains paused while collection proceeds.
Implementation-only coverage remains zero-weight and cannot promote linguistic status.
